title: Polish Fried Rice Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole made with fried rice, dense polish sausage, and melted manchego cheese.
instructions: Cook the polish sausage in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
In a separate skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the cooked sausage and onion mixture to the fried rice and stir-fry until well combined.
Transfer the rice mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Sprinkle the shredded manchego cheese over the top of the rice mixture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
